description: The full backbone matrix over a directory: every lpp blueprint must pass validate + TLC + TLAPS
rules: read-only on the target — writes only the structured report into RECORD_STORE
fail-closed: a missing prover binary is status=fail (missing_tool), never a silent skip or pass
deterministic structured JSON out — the report IS the certificate the ledger records
usage: Set TARGET_DIR (searched recursively for lpp/v0.2.0 blueprints); optional TLC_TIMEOUT/TLAPM_TIMEOUT. Output: backbone_preflight.json with per-file matrix + summary; status=ok only on a full green matrix.
limitation: Empty discovery is a FAIL (a preflight that checked nothing must not read as a pass). Same abstraction bounds as the tlc/tlaps perks.
